data.description:

Fomento Economico Mexicano ( (FMX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 27, 2026, FEMSA released its Sustainability-Related Financial Disclosures prepared under the IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards issued by the International Sustainability Standards Board. By aligning its reporting with these globally recognized sustainability standards and publishing the disclosures on its website, FEMSA signals a stronger commitment to transparent ESG reporting, which may enhance its standing with investors and other stakeholders focused on sustainability performance.

The move reinforces FEMSA’s positioning as a major Latin American retail and beverage player that is increasingly integrating sustainability into its financial communication. This could support the company’s inclusion and credibility in global ESG indexes, potentially broadening its appeal among responsible investment funds and underpinning long-term stakeholder confidence in its governance and risk management practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (FMX) stock is a Buy with a $122.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fomento Economico Mexicano stock, see the FMX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FMX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FMX is a Outperform.

Overall score reflects solid underlying financial quality and improving cash generation, tempered by weakening net profitability and returns. Technicals add support with a clear uptrend and positive momentum, while valuation is reasonable with an attractive dividend but not clearly cheap. Earnings call takeaways were balanced, with growth and margin positives offset by a sizable net income decline and a challenging Mexico backdrop.

To see Spark’s full report on FMX stock, click here.

More about Fomento Economico Mexicano

Fomento Económico Mexicano, S.A.B. de C.V. (FEMSA) is a Mexico-based conglomerate focused on retail and beverages, operating in 18 countries. It runs the OXXO small-format store chain and other proximity retail formats in the Americas and Europe, a health division with drugstores and digital financial services under Spin, and Coca-Cola FEMSA, the world’s largest Coca-Cola bottler by volume.

data.title: Australian Oilseeds Overhauls Finance and Board Ranks With New CFO and Independent Director
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Australian Oilseeds Holdings ( (COOT) ) has issued an update.

On March 27, 2026, Australian Oilseeds Holdings announced a series of board and executive changes, including the same‑day resignation of Chief Financial Officer Amarjeet Singh and independent director Elena Cozneac, both said to be unrelated to any disagreements over the company’s operations or policies. The board has moved quickly to refresh leadership, appointing seasoned finance executive Jiang Honglei as CFO effective March 31, 2026, and sales and operations specialist Mok Sin Ting as an independent director effective March 30, 2026, moves that strengthen financial oversight and commercial expertise while signalling continuity and stability for investors.

Jiang, 43, brings a background in audit oversight, financial leasing and banking, along with U.S. securities compliance experience, while Mok, 38, adds international sales, business development and wealth‑management credentials to the board. Both appointees have formal agreements in place, and the company has clarified that neither has related‑party ties or material transactions with Australian Oilseeds, aiming to reinforce governance standards and reassure stakeholders amid the leadership transition.

The most recent analyst rating on (COOT) stock is a Hold with a $0.55 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Australian Oilseeds Holdings stock, see the COOT Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, COOT is a Neutral.

The score is driven down primarily by weak financial performance: compressed margins, ongoing net losses, high leverage versus equity, and negative free cash flow. Technicals also remain soft with the stock trading below major moving averages. Valuation is only moderately supportive with a mid-range P/E and no dividend yield.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

Brookfield Business Corp. Class A ( (TSE:BBUC) ) has provided an update.

On March 27, 2026, the company legally changed its name from Brookfield Business Corporation to Brookfield Business Holdings Corporation under the British Columbia Business Corporations Act, with the change effective at 12:01 a.m. Pacific Time and reported to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission via a Form 6-K. The filing also reconfirms the company’s existing share structure and previously adopted articles, including multiple classes of common and preferred shares with distinct rights and restrictions, signaling continuity in its capital framework and governance while aligning its corporate identity more closely with its role as a holdings entity within the Brookfield group.

The name change was approved by the board of directors on March 16, 2026, following earlier shareholder approval in March 2022 of updated articles that define detailed governance provisions and share rights. For investors and other stakeholders, the move primarily represents a rebranding and clarification of the company’s position in Brookfield’s organizational structure, rather than a change to ownership, management, or operating strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BBUC) stock is a Hold with a C$50.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brookfield Business Corp. Class A stock, see the TSE:BBUC Stock Forecast page.

The company is incorporated under the British Columbia Business Corporations Act, with its registered and records office in Vancouver and executive offices at Brookfield Place in New York and Toronto, reflecting its North American focus and global investment platform.

data.title: Kopin Delays 2025 Annual Report Filing
data.description:
Kopin ( (KOPN) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Kopin Corporation has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will delay its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 27, 2025. The company says the delay applies specifically to the 2025 Form 10-K (Yearly Report), not to its other required SEC filings.

Management explains the holdup stems from complex financing transactions completed in the fourth quarter involving third-party investments in Kopin Corporation. These deals raise challenging U.S. GAAP questions around how to recognize, measure, and present the arrangements, requiring more technical work and valuation analysis.

Because of these accounting complexities, Kopin needs extra time to finalize its financial statements and related disclosures tied to the new transactions. The company emphasizes that filing on time would have required unreasonable effort or expense under the current circumstances.

Kopin currently expects to submit its Annual Report on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard fifteen-calendar-day extension allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25. Investors should note that this timing is an expectation, not a guarantee, and could shift if the accounting work takes longer than planned.

The company also warns that it anticipates a significant change in full-year 2025 results compared with the prior year, largely driven by the fourth-quarter financing transactions and the deconsolidation of one of its entities. These moves are expected to affect reported gains or losses and alter the presentation of Kopin’s financials after the deconsolidation.

These forward-looking statements about timing and financial impact are subject to risks and uncertainties, including the completion of the remaining accounting and reporting work. Kopin states it remains focused on meeting its reporting obligations, and the notification is signed by Treasurer and Chief Financial Officer Erich Manz on March 27, 2026, underscoring executive-level responsibility for compliance.

The most recent analyst rating on (KOPN) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kopin stock, see the KOPN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KOPN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KOPN is a Neutral.

The score is held back mainly by continued losses and ongoing cash burn, despite a low-leverage balance sheet and improving margins. Technicals are supportive with the stock trading above key moving averages, while valuation remains constrained by negative earnings. data.title: Bright Mountain Media Faces Imminent Downgrade to OTC Pink
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bright Mountain Media ( (BMTM) ) just unveiled an update.

On December 9, 2025, Bright Mountain Media was notified by OTC Markets Group that its shares no longer met OTCQB bid-price standards after closing below $0.01 for more than 30 consecutive days, triggering a cure period that was later extended to April 9, 2026. The company was also warned that a sustained bid below $0.001 for five days would prompt immediate OTCQB removal.

Management evaluated options to regain compliance, including a reverse stock split, but decided against such measures due to cost, administrative burden and low trading volume, concluding they were not in shareholders’ best interests. As the company has not restored compliance, management now expects the stock to move from the OTCQB to the lower-tier OTC Pink market on April 10, 2026, a shift that could reduce visibility and liquidity for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMTM) stock is a Hold with a $0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bright Mountain Media stock, see the BMTM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BMTM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BMTM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial fundamentals—persistent losses, compressed margins, and a highly stressed balance sheet with deep negative equity and high leverage. A negative financing event (loan payment deferral with equity issuance) adds liquidity and dilution risk. Improved but still small and volatile cash generation provides only partial support, while technical and valuation signals are limited/undermined by missing indicators and ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on BMTM stock, click here.

More about Bright Mountain Media

Bright Mountain Media, Inc. operates in the digital media and advertising sector, with its common stock trading on the OTC Markets under the symbol BMTM. The company’s shares are quoted on the OTCQB marketplace, which imposes minimum bid price and other continued eligibility standards relevant to smaller public issuers and their investors.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $905.2K

data.description:
Greenway Technologies ( (GWTI) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Greenway Technologies, Inc. & Subsidiaries has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying investors of a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The filing confirms this is a late annual report under U.S. securities rules, not a change in reporting status or structure.

The company cites its very small size and reliance on a single accountant as the primary reason for the delay in preparing the Form 10-K (Yearly Report). With only one person responsible for compiling the annual report, management states that more time is needed to complete the work without incurring unreasonable effort or extra expense.

Greenway Technologies indicates that it expects to file the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-calendar-day extension period allowed under SEC rules. This suggests investors should anticipate the annual report to be filed shortly after the original due date, assuming no additional complications arise.

Management does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year, based on the information available at the time of the notification. As with all forward-looking statements, investors should treat these comments cautiously until the full Form 10-K (Yearly Report) and audited financial statements are made public.

The company affirms that all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, signaling ongoing compliance with its reporting obligations. The notification is signed on behalf of Greenway Technologies by Chief Financial Officer Ransom B. Jones, underscoring management’s responsibility for timely disclosure and completion of the outstanding Form 10-K (Yearly Report).

More about Greenway Technologies

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

Sturm Ruger & Company ( (RGR) ) has shared an update.

Sturm, Ruger & Co., Inc. announced a planned leadership transition in its finance organization, with long-serving Chief Financial Officer Tom Dineen stepping down from his role on March 31, 2026, and remaining with the company until April 30, 2026 to support continuity. Effective April 1, 2026, Andrew Wieland, a finance executive with extensive manufacturing-focused experience at Eaton Corporation, will become Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, reflecting Ruger’s focus on long-term financial strength and execution of its 2030 strategic plan.

In connection with Wieland’s appointment, Ruger will enter into its customary executive severance agreement, which provides defined cash, equity vesting and medical benefits if his employment is terminated without cause or he resigns for good reason, including enhanced protections following a change in control. The board highlighted Wieland’s track record in financial discipline, strategic planning and finance transformation as critical to supporting Ruger’s growth, operational excellence and value creation for employees, customers and shareholders, while expressing gratitude for Dineen’s nearly three-decade contribution to the company’s financial foundation.

The company appointed five new independent directors – Alex Cruz, Kevin A. Lansberry, Steve Pagliuca, Brian P. MacDonald and Jonathan Z. Cibus ( (CBUS) ) has shared an update.

On March 25, 2026, Cibus, Inc. entered into an underwriting agreement with BTIG, LLC for an underwritten public offering of 6,976,744 shares of its Class A common stock at $2.15 per share, with a 30-day option for the underwriter to purchase up to 1,046,511 additional shares. The offering, expected to close around March 27, 2026, is anticipated to generate approximately $13.5 million in net proceeds, or up to $16.0 million if the option is fully exercised, after underwriting discounts and expenses.

Under the agreement, BTIG will receive a 7.0% underwriting discount on gross proceeds and reimbursement of up to $150,000 in documented expenses, while Cibus has provided customary indemnification against certain Securities Act liabilities. The company, along with its directors and executive officers, also agreed to a 60-day lock-up on sales or transfers of Class A common stock without the underwriter’s consent, signaling a temporary restriction on insider share sales following the capital raise.

data.title: Virtuix Expands Military Training Reach With Marine Corps Deal
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Virtuix Holdings Inc. Class A ( (VTIX) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, Virtuix announced that the U.S. Marine Corps Training and Education Command, via partner KBR, purchased an Omni One omni-directional treadmill system for experimentation in warfighter training and mission planning. The unit is slated for delivery to TECOM’s Integration Lab in Quantico, Virginia, in April 2026, where it will be evaluated as part of broader efforts to enhance immersive military training capabilities.

The deal extends Virtuix’s defense footprint, which already includes deployments at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point, the U.S. Air Force Academy, and Yokota Air Base, underscoring growing interest in full-body VR for operational planning and combat readiness. The company views the Marine Corps deployment as validation of its Virtual Terrain Walk technology and a potential catalyst for larger defense contracts, signaling strengthening traction across multiple branches of the U.S. military and a deeper role in next-generation simulation and training.

More about Virtuix Holdings Inc. Class A

Virtuix Inc., listed on Nasdaq as VTIX, is a manufacturer of full-body virtual reality systems serving consumer, enterprise, and defense markets. Its flagship Omni-branded omni-directional treadmills let users walk and run in 360 degrees inside games and other VR applications, while its Virtual Terrain Walk platform uses XR and AI to create immersive, geo-specific training environments for clients worldwide.

Founded on immersive simulation technologies, Virtuix has increasingly targeted defense and military training use cases, positioning its systems as tools for realistic mission planning and combat readiness. By integrating AI-driven 3D reconstruction with VR movement hardware, the company aims to deepen its foothold across multiple U.S. military branches and expand its presence in the broader defense technology ecosystem.

data.title: Source Capital’s adviser nominated for Morningstar stewardship award
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Source Capital Inc. ( (SOR) ) just unveiled an update.

On March 27, 2026, First Pacific Advisors announced it had been nominated for Morningstar’s 2026 US Awards for Investing Excellence in the Exemplary Stewardship category, recognizing the firm’s focus on acting in investors’ best interests. The nomination places FPA alongside major peers PIMCO and Vanguard and reflects Morningstar’s assessment of its investor-centric culture, alignment of manager and client interests, and strong Parent Pillar rating.

FPA leaders highlighted the firm’s decades-long commitment to stewardship, including investing alongside clients and limiting fund capacity, with some fixed income strategies closed to new institutional accounts. The recognition underscores FPA’s bid to differentiate itself in the asset management industry through disciplined risk management, capital preservation, and prioritizing investor outcomes over asset growth.

More about Source Capital Inc.

First Pacific Advisors, LP is an independent, 100% employee-owned institutional money management firm focused on value investing and capital preservation. The firm manages $33 billion as of February 28, 2025, across equity, multi-asset, and fixed income strategies offered through mutual funds, ETFs, separate accounts, collective investment trusts, and the Source Capital closed-end fund.

Its product lineup includes flagship strategies such as FPA Crescent, FPA New Income, FPA Flexible Fixed Income, Queens Road value and small-cap funds, global equity and short-duration government ETFs, and Source Capital (NYSE: SOR). FPA emphasizes capacity management, often soft-closing larger funds to protect performance and align its interests with those of long-term investors.

data.title: Planet Labs Announces Redemption of Outstanding Public Warrants
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Planet Labs PBC ( (PL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 27, 2026, Planet Labs PBC announced it will redeem all of its outstanding public warrants to purchase Class A common stock that were originally issued as part of its IPO units. The move follows satisfaction of the stock-price condition in the warrant agreement, reflecting a sustained share price above the $18 threshold required to trigger redemption.

Holders may exercise their public warrants at $11.50 per share until 5:00 p.m. New York City time on April 27, 2026, after which any unexercised warrants will be void, delisted and only entitled to the $0.01 per-warrant redemption price. The action simplifies Planet’s capital structure, potentially reducing future dilution for existing shareholders while forcing warrant holders to decide between exercising or accepting the nominal cash redemption.

The most recent analyst rating on (PL) stock is a Buy with a $38.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Planet Labs PBC stock, see the PL Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on PL stock, click here.

More about Planet Labs PBC

Planet Labs PBC is a leading provider of global, daily satellite imagery and geospatial solutions, designing, building and operating the largest Earth observation fleet of imaging satellites. Founded in 2010 and listed on the NYSE under the ticker PL, it supplies mission-critical data and software to customers in agriculture, forestry, intelligence, education, finance and government sectors worldwide.

The company’s mission is to image the world every day and make change visible, accessible and actionable for commercial and public users. By delivering advanced insights and tools derived from satellite imagery, Planet positions itself at the center of data-driven decision-making across industries that rely on timely, high-resolution views of Earth’s surface.
